# J.O.A.T. Kenya

> Digital innovation studio based in Kiambu, Kenya. Builds software, runs digital marketing, produces media and animation, deploys AI solutions, and creates children's digital education for clients worldwide. Founded 1983.

J.O.A.T. stands for "Jack of All Trades." The studio operates five service lines and ships two in-house products (BioBiz, Majobo Kenya). All work is delivered from Thindigua, Kiambu Road, with clients spanning Kenya, the wider East African region, and international markets. JOAT can be contacted at joatkenya120@gmail.com or +254 142 378 150.

## Services

- [Software Development](https://joatkenya.com/services): Mobile apps (iOS, Android), web applications and AI-integrated products. Stack: TypeScript, React, Node, Supabase, Postgres. Reference build: BioBiz.
- [Digital Marketing](https://joatkenya.com/services): Generative campaign creative, organic content and paid social across Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn and Facebook.
- [Media & Content Production](https://joatkenya.com/services): 2D and 3D animation, motion graphics, live-action video. Tooling: Blender, full studio pipeline (model → rig → animate → render).
- [Children's Digital Education](https://joatkenya.com/services): Curriculum-aligned animated content and learning games for ages 1–8. Reference IP: Amare's Big Planet.
- [AI Solutions](https://joatkenya.com/services): Claude, OpenAI and OpenRouter integrations. Meeting summarisation, live foreign-language translation, content generation, and agentic automation.

## Products

- [BioBiz](https://biobiz.app): Digital business card app with AI meeting notes and live foreign-language to English transcription. iOS and Android.
- [Majobo Kenya](https://www.majobokenya.com/): Jobs marketplace with 1,000+ AI-classified listings.

## Insights & Articles

- [How Much Does It Cost to Build a Mobile App in 2026?](https://joatkenya.com/news?article=mobile-app-development-cost-2026): Tiered cost breakdown for simple, medium and complex apps with real examples.
- [15 AI Tools Every Small Business Should Use in 2026](https://joatkenya.com/news?article=best-ai-tools-small-business-2026): Curated AI toolset across writing, design, marketing, code, ops and support.
- [Modern Animation Pipelines: From Storyboard to Render](https://joatkenya.com/news?article=modern-animation-pipelines): Production pipeline used in JOAT's media work.
